description: SP8192 + 11L Depth Recurrence (L3-5) + Parallel Residuals (L7+) + MuonEq-R + Score-First SGD TTT + GPTQ SDClip int6/int8 + Brotli-11
notes: 3-seed verified. Best seed (42): quantized_sliding_window val_bpb=1.10620295, val_loss=2.85742509, pre-quant val_bpb=1.10553199, artifact=15,539,696 bytes, total=15,629,070 bytes, steps=5104, wallclock=588s. Architecture: 11L×512d×8H/4KV GQA, MLP 4×(2048d) LeakyReLU(0.5)², depth recurrence L3–5 ×2 (enabled at 35% training), parallel residuals L7–10, XSA all 11 layers, SmearGate, U-Net skip connections, Partial RoPE 16/64 dims, tied embeddings, logit_softcap=30, QK-Gain=5.25. Optimizer: MuonEq-R (row-normalised NS5, momentum=0.99, WD=0.095) + AdamW embeds/scalars. EMA(0.9965) + SWA(14 ckpts). Quant: Full-Hessian GPTQ SDClip int6 (k=12.85σ) matrices, int8 (k=20σ) embeddings, Brotli-11. 8×H100 SXM, FA3, torch.compile(fullgraph=True).
